corrections.note: The lemma includes αυτην before the closing bracket.
The parenthetical reading shows τῶν with accent in print.
There is a period after syr in the apparatus.
The variant reading is φιλουσιν, not φιλουσιν.
The apparatus has the numeral 5, not the letter s.

notes: Running head and main body text otherwise match the scan. Page number 360 at foot is present in the scan but not treated as body text.
